title: PCR of mouse PCSK9 from cDNA (cleavage template)
steps: Prepare the PCR mix and divide into PCR tubes with 20 or 40 uL each %s %s Reagent Amount H2O 50 μL GC buffer 16 μL DNTPs 1.6 μL 10 uM M13 fwd (-41) primer 4 μL 10 uM M13 rev (-48) primer 4 μL cDNA 1 μL Phusion .8 μLsdf
Thermocycler protocol %s %s temp time 98 °C 30 s 98 °C 10 s 61 °C 10 s 72 °C 10 s Repeat steps 2-4, 23 times 72 °C 2 min 4 °C hold
Add 10 μL of 6x loading buffer per 40 uL PCR reaction and vortex
Use a razor to carefully excise the bands (~2 kb) under UV light.
Load gel slices onto the Ultrafree DA columns and spin at 5,000 g for 10 min 00:10:00
Start with 20 μL of water, dilute (~1.5 uL : 8.5 uL H2O), and run on PAGE to estimate concentration
Prepare an agarose gel with the largest comb and load 25 μL per well
creator: Noreen Wauford
